fullText.ImperiusValorousBrandBurnTheImpure|Imper: Consuming a Valorous Brand mark deals bonus damage equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2.5%</c> of the Hero's maximum Health.
fullText.ImperiusValorousPursuit|ImperiusValorous: Activate to teleport to an enemy that has been marked by Valorous Brand and gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.
fullText.ImperiusWrathOfTheAngirisUnrelentingDesc: Descending from the Heavens restores <c val="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> of Imperius' maximum Health and Mana. Consuming a Valorous Brand reduces the cooldown of Wrath of the Angiris by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.
fullText.ImperiusWrathOfTheAngiris|ImperiusWrathO: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds, charge in the target direction, lifting the first enemy Hero hit into the Heavens. While in the air, Imperius can steer the landing location by moving.<n/><n/>After <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, slam the target into the ground, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers">250</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to them, increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for each Valorous Brand on the target when landing, and Stunning them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.
fullText.InescapableAnnihilation|InescapableAnnih: Globe of Annihilation can now be cast globally.
fullText.JainaBlizzardSnowstorm|JainaBlizzardSnow: The damage of the second wave of Blizzard is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. The damage of the third wave is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>.
fullText.JainaBlizzardStormFront|JainaBlizzardSto: Increase the cast range of Blizzard by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> and its radius by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.
fullText.JainaConeOfColdIceFloes|JainaConeOfColdI: Increase the width of Cone of Cold by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> and cause each Hero hit to reduce its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, doubled against chilled Heroes, up to a maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds per use.
fullText.JainaConeOfColdNorthernExposure|JainaCon: Enemies damaged by Cone of Cold have their Armor lowered by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, increasing their damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.
fullText.JainaConeOfColdNumbingBlast|JainaConeOfC: Cone of Cold Roots Chilled targets for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.
fullText.JainaFingersOfFrost|JainaFingersOfFrost|: Quest: Gather Regeneration Globes to increase Jaina's Mana regeneration by 0.1 per second, up to 2 per second. Reward: After gathering 20 Globes, the damage bonus from Frostbite is increased by 10%.
fullText.JainaFrigidTransmission|JainaFrigidTrans: Activate to teleport a short distance and Chill all nearby enemies.
fullText.JainaFrostbiteArcaneIntellect|JainaFrost: Dealing damage to a Chilled target returns Mana to Jaina. Basic Attacks return <c val="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> Mana and Abilities return <c val="#TooltipNumbers">20</c>.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>While above <c val="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> Mana, Jaina gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> Spell Power.
fullText.JainaFrostbiteDeepChill|JainaFrostbiteDe: Frostbite's Chill can now stack a second time, slowing targets up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.
fullText.JainaFrostbiteFrostArmor|JainaFrostbiteF: Enemies that attack Jaina are Chilled. Additionally, every <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds, Jaina gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.
fullText.JainaFrostbiteIceBarrier|JainaFrostbiteI: Gain a Shield for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of Ability damage dealt to Chilled targets. The shield lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.
fullText.JainaFrostbiteLingeringChill|JainaFrostb: Increase the duration of Chill from <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.
fullText.JainaFrostboltFrostShards|JainaFrostbolt: Frostbolt will now pierce the first two targets.
fullText.JainaFrostboltIceLance|JainaFrostboltIce: Hitting a Chilled target with Frostbolt reduces its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds and restores <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Mana.
fullText.JainaFrostboltWintersReach|JainaFrostbol: Increase the range and travel speed of Frostbolt by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.
fullText.JainaHeroicRingOfFrost|JainaRingOfFrost|: After a <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> second delay, create a Ring of Frost in an area that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers">310</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Roots enemies for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. The ring persists for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds afterward, Chilling any enemies who touch it.
fullText.JainaHeroicSummonWaterElemental|JainaSum: Summon a Water Elemental at target location. The Water Elemental's Basic Attacks deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers">62</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, splash for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> damage and Chill. The Ability can be reactivated to retarget the Water Elemental. Loses Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers">32</c> seconds.
fullText.JainaIcefuryWand|JainaIcefuryWand|Passiv: Basic Attacks against Chilled enemies deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> more damage and lower the cooldown of Blizzard by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds. Doubled against enemy Heroes.
fullText.JainaIcyVeins|JainaIcyVeinsHotbar|Active: Activate to make Jaina's Basic Abilities' cooldowns recharge <c val="#TooltipNumbers">200%</c> faster and reduce their Mana cost by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.
fullText.JainaRingOfFrostColdSnap|JainaRingOfFros: The center area of Ring of Frost deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers">310</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Roots enemies after the outer ring expires. Each enemy Hero hit reduces its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds.
fullText.JainaSummonWaterElementalWintermute|Jain: Increases the cast range of Water Elemental by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>, and the Water Elemental will now mimic Jaina's Basic Abilities for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> damage.
fullText.JunkratConcussionMineBlowEmUp|JunkratBlo: Hitting an enemy Hero with Concussion Mine or Steel Trap causes Junkrat to deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> more damage with Basic Attacks and Basic Abilities for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.
fullText.JunkratConcussionMineBoggedDown|JunkratB: Enemies launched by Concussion Mine are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds upon landing.
fullText.JunkratConcussionMineBOOMPOW|JunkratBOOM: Hitting an enemy Hero with Concussion Mine reduces its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.
fullText.JunkratConcussionMineRipperAir|JunkratRi: Junkrat is knocked back <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> farther by Concussion Mine. Additionally, Concussion Mine's cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">12</c> seconds if only Junkrat is hit.
fullText.JunkratFragLauncherBombsAwayTalent|Junkr: Increase Junkrat's Basic Attack range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c>. Frag Launcher grenades fired within <c val="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds of using a Basic Attack deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> bonus damage.
fullText.JunkratFragLauncherBurstFire|JunkratBurs: Frag Launcher fires all of its charges in a continuous burst, its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, but it loses <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> maximum charge.
fullText.JunkratFragLauncherCannonball|JunkratCan: Increase the radius and explosion radius of grenades from Basic Attacks and Frag Launcher by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.
fullText.JunkratFragLauncherEndlessNades|JunkratE: Hitting an enemy Hero with Frag Launcher reduces its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.
fullText.JunkratFragLauncherExtraWoundTimers|Junk: The final grenade launched from Frag Launcher deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> bonus damage, and Frag Launcher grenades last an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds before automatically detonating.
fullText.JunkratFragLauncherSpreadVolley|JunkratS: Activate to make Frag Launcher fire <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> additional grenades in a spread. Works for up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> total charges, or until Frag Launcher runs out of charges.
fullText.JunkratFragLauncherTasteForExplosions|Ju: Quest: Hitting a Hero with Frag Launcher increases its damage by 0.2%, up to 40%.
fullText.JunkratFragLauncherTrickyShuffles|Junkra: While Frag Launcher has no charges left, Junkrat gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> Movement Speed and his Basic Attacks deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> bonus damage.
fullText.JunkratIHateWaitingTalent|JunkratIHateWa: Junkrat always rides his Rocket Ride Mount, which grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> increased Movement Speed, but his Mount cooldown is increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds.
fullText.JunkratRIPTireExtraOomph|JunkratExtraOom: Increase RIP-Tire's knockback distance by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c>, and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> seconds for each enemy Hero hit.
fullText.JunkratRIPTire|JunkratRIPTire|Heroic|Lev: Create a motorized bomb with <c val="#TooltipNumbers">530</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health that lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds. While active, Junkrat is immobile but gains control of RIP-Tire's movement.<n/><n/>RIP-Tire can be reactivated to detonate immediately, knocking nearby enemies back and dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers">720</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies near the center gradually reduced to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">445</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> to enemies on the edge.
fullText.JunkratRocketRidePuckishScamp|JunkratPuc: Junkrat also gains the Ability RIP-Tire. Each time he uses his Heroic, it swaps to the alternate ability.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce both Heroic cooldowns by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> seconds.
fullText.JunkratRocketRide|JunkratRocketRide|Hero: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds, Junkrat launches into the air. While in the air, he can steer the landing location by moving.<n/><n/>After <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3.75</c> seconds, Junkrat lands, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers">935</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies and activating Total Mayhem. <c val="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds after landing, Junkrat reappears at the Hall of Storms and gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> additional Movement Speed until dismounted.
fullText.JunkratSteelTrapBigAs|JunkratBigAsSteelT: Steel Trap now only hits Heroes, and Heroes hit have their Armor reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. Increases Steel Trap's radius and damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.
fullText.JunkratSteelTrapChatteringTeeth|JunkratC: Steel Traps will slowly chase nearby enemy Heroes.
fullText.JunkratSteelTrapGottaTrapEmAll|JunkratGo: Reduce Steel Trap's cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds and increase the maximum number of active traps to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c>.
fullText.JunkratSteelTrapStickyWicket|JunkratStic: Enemy Heroes who are hit by Steel Trap are Silenced for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.
fullText.JunkratTotalMayhemDirtyTricksterTalent|J: Increase the explosion radius of Total Mayhem by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>. When Junkrat is Stunned, Rooted, or damaged by an enemy Hero while below <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Health, he uses Total Mayhem, dropping <c val="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> grenades at his feet that explode. <n/><n/>This effect has a <c val="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> second cooldown.
fullText.KaelthasFlamestrikeBurnedFlesh|KaelthasB: When Flamestrike damages <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> or more Heroes, they take additional damage equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">8%</c> of their maximum Health.
fullText.KaelthasFlamestrikeConvection|KaelthasFl: Repeatable Quest: Hit 20 enemy Heroes with Flamestrike without dying.Repeatable Reward: Permanently increases Flamestrike damage by 200, and Kael'thas's maximum Health by 100.
fullText.KaelthasFlamestrikeFuryOfTheSunwell|Kael: Flamestrike will explode a second time <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds later.
fullText.KaelthasFlamestrikeManaTap|KaelthasManaT: Activating Verdant Spheres restores <c val="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> of Kael'thas's maximum Mana.
fullText.KaelthasGravityLapseEnergyRoil|KaelthasG: Reduce the Mana cost of Gravity Lapse by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">70.</c> If Gravity Lapse hits a Hero, reduce its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds.
fullText.KaelthasGravityLapseNetherWind|KaelthasG: Increases Gravity Lapse's range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>. When Gravity Lapse hits an enemy Hero, refund <c val="#TooltipNumbers">80</c> Mana.
fullText.KaelthasHeroicAbilityPhoenix|KaelthasPho: Launch a Phoenix to an area, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers">84</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies along the way. The Phoenix persists for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> seconds, attacking enemies for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">84</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and splashing for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">42</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.
fullText.KaelthasHeroicAbilityPyroblast|KaelthasP: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, cast a slow-moving fireball that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers">810</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+5% per level)</c> damage to an enemy Hero and <c val="#TooltipNumbers">405</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+5% per level)</c> damage to enemies nearby.
fullText.KaelthasLivingBombBackdraft|KaelthasLivi: Living Bomb's explosion slows enemy Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.
fullText.KaelthasLivingBombFissionBomb|KaelthasLi: Increases Living Bomb's explosion radius by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>.
fullText.KaelthasLivingBombIgnite|KaelthasLivingB: Flamestrikes apply Living Bomb to the enemy Hero closest to its center who is not currently affected by Living Bomb.
fullText.KaelthasLivingBombPyromaniac|KaelthasLiv: Each time Living Bomb deals periodic damage, Kael'thas's Basic Ability cooldowns are reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.
fullText.KaelthasLivingBombSunKingsFury|KaelthasL: Living Bombs that have spread to enemy Heroes deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> more damage.
fullText.KaelthasManaAddict|KaelthasManaAddictTal: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Kael'thas's maximum Mana by 15.Reward: After gathering 20 Globes, Kael'thas can activate Arcane Barrier to gain a Shield equal to 100% of his maximum Mana for 4 seconds. 45 second cooldown.
fullText.KaelthasMasterOfFlames|KaelthasMasterOfF: Living Bomb's spread from explosions can now also spread Living Bomb.
fullText.KaelthasMasteryFlamethrower|KaelthasFlam: Increases the cast range of Flamestrike by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>. If Flamestrike hits <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> or more Heroes, its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.
fullText.KaelthasMasterySunfireEnchantment|Kaelth: Activating Verdant Spheres causes Kael'thas's next <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> Basic Attacks to instead deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers">115</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Spell Damage. If both of these Attacks hit enemy Heroes, gain<c val="#TooltipNumbers"> 15%</c> Spell Power for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.
fullText.KaelthasPhoenixRebirth|KaelthasPhoenixRe: Increases Phoenix duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>. While alive, the Phoenix may be ordered to move to a different location. Stores <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> charges.
fullText.KaelthasPyroblastPresenceOfMind|Kaelthas: Increases Pyroblast's explosion radius by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. Heroes that are hit by Flamestrike or have Living Bomb spread to them reduce the cooldown of Pyroblast by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.
fullText.KaelthasTwinSpheres|KaelthasVerdantSpher: Verdant Spheres gains a second charge.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Kael'thas benefits from all of his level <c val="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> talents.
fullText.KaelthasVerdantSpheresFelInfusion|Kaelth: Increases Kael'thas's Spell Power by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4%</c>. Kael'thas heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">94</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health when activating Verdant Spheres.
fullText.KelThuzadAcceleratedDecay|KelThuzadAccel: Each time a Hero is hit by Death and Decay's pool, they take <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> more periodic damage from Death and Decay for the next <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> times.
fullText.KelThuzadArcaneEchoes|KelThuzadArcaneEch: Whenever Kel'Thuzad hits an enemy Hero with Death and Decay's explosion, its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadArchlichArmor|KelThuzadArchlich: Activate to gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Physical Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Upon activation, nearby enemies take <c val="#TooltipNumbers">45</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadBarbedChains|KelThuzadBarbedCha: Increase Chains of Kel'Thuzad damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">125%</c>. After gaining <c val="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Blight, Chains of Kel'Thuzad reduces the Armor of pulled Heroes by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadBlightedFrost|KelThuzadBlighted: Frost Nova deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> more damage to enemies in the center. After gaining <c val="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Blight, increase Frost Nova's Root duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadChainLink|KelThuzadChainLink|E|: Pulling a Hero with Chains of Kel'Thuzad reduces its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds and refunds its Mana cost.
fullText.KelThuzadChainsOfIce|KelThuzadChainsOfIc: After Chains of Kel'Thuzad's Stun expires, the enemy is also Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.
fullText.KelThuzadChillingTouch|KelThuzadChilling: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds, Kel'Thuzad's next Basic Attack hits all enemies in the area for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c>  additional damage, deals Spell damage instead of Physical, and Slows by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadDeathchill|KelThuzadDeathchill|: When Frost Blast's Root expires, enemies are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. Heroes killed while under the effects of Frost Blast instantly release another Frost Blast explosion.
fullText.KelThuzadFrozenTomb|KelThuzadFrozenTomb|: Launch a meteor of ice at an enemy Hero. Upon impact, the meteor deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers">115</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage to its target and <c val="#TooltipNumbers">275</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage to enemies in the area. All enemies hit by Frost Blast are Rooted for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadHungeringCold|KelThuzadHungerin: Enemies that are Rooted take an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers">55</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage each time they are damaged by Kel'Thuzad.
fullText.KelThuzadIceCold|KelThuzadIceCold|Passiv: Reduce the cooldown of Glacial Spike by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds and increase its damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">400%</c>.
fullText.KelThuzadIcyGrasp|KelThuzadIcyGrasp|W|Le: Increase Frost Nova's Slow by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>. Each time Kel'Thuzad damages enemies Slowed by Frost Nova, reduce the cooldown of Frost Nova by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadMightOfTheScourge|KelThuzadMigh: If a Hero is hit with Shadow Fissure, a second one is cast below them <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second later. This second cast will not duplicate itself.
fullText.KelThuzadPhylactery|KelThuzadPhylactery|: Quest: Collect 12 Regeneration Globes to charge Kel'Thuzad's Phylactery.Reward: Kel'Thuzad's Phylactery can be activated while dead to immediately respawn at the Hall of Storms, but must be charged again.Passive: Kel'Thuzad heals for 10% of all Spell Damage dealt while the Phylactery is charged.
fullText.KelThuzadPowerOfIcecrown|KelThuzadPowerO: Stunning, Rooting, or Slowing a Hero grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers">6%</c> Spell Power for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> times.
fullText.KelThuzadShadowFissure|KelThuzadShadowFi: Create a fissure anywhere on the Battleground that explodes after <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers">320</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage to enemy Heroes in its area. If an enemy Hero is hit, set its cooldown to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadShiftingMalice|KelThuzadShiftin: Activate to dash forward, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers">150</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage to enemies in the path. Takedowns reset the cooldown of Shifting Malice.
fullText.KelThuzadStripShields|KelThuzadStripShie: Pulling a Hero with Chains of Kel'Thuzad grants Kel'Thuzad a permanent <c val="#TooltipNumbers">128</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Shield, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> times.<n/><n/>Additionally, Chains of Kel'Thuzad deals up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">270</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> bonus damage to Heroes' Shields.
fullText.KelThuzadTheDamnedReturn|KelThuzadTheDam: Activate to create a Shade of Naxxramas that lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds and mimics Kel'Thuzad's casts of Death and Decay.
fullText.KelThuzadThePlaguelands|KelThuzadThePlag: Increase Death and Decay's duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second. After gaining <c val="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Blight, increase the radius of Death and Decay's pool by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.
fullText.KerriganAssimilationAssimilationBlades|K: Damaging an enemy increases Basic Attack damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.
fullText.KerriganAssimilationMastery|KerriganAssi: Regeneration Globe healing grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> points of Assimilation Shields per second while active. While Assimilation is active, Kerrigan's Health and Mana regeneration is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c>.
fullText.KerriganAssimilationVolatilePower|Kerrig: Increase the amount of Assimilation Shields granted from damage dealt by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c>, but reduce duration of Assimilation by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.
fullText.KerriganBladedMomentum|KerriganBladedMom: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Kerrigan's Basic Abilities by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.
fullText.KerriganChrysalis|KerriganChrysalis|Acti: Activate to place Kerrigan in a Chrysalis with <c val="#TooltipNumbers">650</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. While inside, Kerrigan regenerates <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4%</c> of her maximum Health per second.<n/><n/>Enemies can destroy the Chrysalis to end its effects early.

fullText.ZuljinEnsnare|ZuljinEnsnare|Active|Level: Throw a net forward, Rooting the first enemy Hero hit for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds. If no Heroes are hit, Ensnare's cooldown is reduced to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.
fullText.ZuljinEyeOfZuljin|ZuljinEyeOfZuljin|Pass: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant Zul'jin <c val="#TooltipNumbers">6%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.
fullText.ZuljinFerocity|ZuljinFerocity|Trait|Leve: Increases the Attack Speed bonus of Berserker by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.
fullText.ZuljinForestMedicine|ZuljinForestMedicin: Regeneration is no longer Channeled, and cannot be interrupted.
fullText.ZuljinGuillotine|ZuljinGuillotine|Heroic: Zul'jin launches a massive axe into the air that drops on the targeted area, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers">330</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage plus bonus damage the lower his Health is.
fullText.ZuljinHeadhunter|ZuljinHeadhunter|Passiv: Quest: Zul'jin's first Takedown against each enemy Hero permanently increases his damage dealt by 2.5%.Reward: After getting Takedowns on every enemy Hero, Basic Attack range is increased by 1.1.
fullText.ZuljinLacerate|ZuljinLacerate|W|Level13: Increase the Slow amount of each Twin Cleave axe by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> and its duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.
fullText.ZuljinLetTheKillingBegin|ZuljinLetTheKil: When Zul'jin kills an enemy, his Attack Speed is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c>, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>, for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">12</c> seconds. Basic Attacks refresh the duration.<n/><n/>Hero Takedowns instantly grant <c val="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> Attack Speed.
fullText.ZuljinNoMercyTalent|ZuljinNoMercyTalent|: Zul'jin's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes marked with Grievous Throw ignore Armor and deal an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> of maximum Health as damage.
fullText.ZuljinPassiveASurpriseForYa|Zul'jinPassi: Basic Attacks bounce to a nearby enemy for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> damage, prioritizing enemy Heroes.
fullText.ZuljinRecklessness|ZuljinRecklessness|Tr: While Zul'jin is below <c val="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> Health, he gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> Spell Power. While he is below <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Health, his Basic Attack damage is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> and Basic Attacks against Heroes grant an additional stack of You Want Axe?.
fullText.ZuljinTazdingo|ZuljinTazdingo|Heroic|Lev: For the next <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, Zul'jin is Unkillable, and cannot be reduced to less than <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Health. Taz'dingo!
fullText.ZuljinTrollsBlood|ZuljinTrollsBlood|E|Le: Increase Regeneration's healing by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>. If Regeneration fully finishes, restore <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of Zul'jin's maximum Mana.
fullText.ZuljinViciousAssault|ZuljinViciousAssaul: Increase the duration of Grievous Throw's mark by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds and its damage bonus by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">45%</c>.
fullText.ZuljinVoodooShuffle|ZuljinVoodooShuffle|: Activate to remove Roots and Slows.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Lower the cooldown and Mana cost of Regeneration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.
fullText.ZuljinWrongPlaceWrongTime|ZuljinWrongPla: If an enemy is hit by both Twin Cleave axes at the same time, they take an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers">100</c><c val="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and count as <c val="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> Hero hits for You Want Axe?.

description.AbathurSymbiote: Spawn and attach a Symbiote to a target ally or Structure. While active, Abathur controls the Symbiote, gaining access to new Abilities. The Symbiote is able to gain XP from nearby enemy deaths.
description.MedicMedivacDropship: Target a location for a Medivac transport. For up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds before takeoff, allies can right-click to enter the Medivac.
